title: Junior Business Development Manager at Housing.com

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Housing.com in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
